calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Suzanne Cooper (Executor).

Ms. Yee stated that she requested a six month extension of time to administer the estate because the Executor has been dealing with some health issues and personal issues. The Court noted that the Executor should not have so much in reimbursements and costs, and stated that it will not grant a six month extension. The Court granted the petition for approval of report on status of administration and continued administration of the estate until March 20, 2019. Status on close of estate is set for March 20, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Continued To Oct-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on October 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
